semantic.role: Integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI, specifically testing security-related commands (likely 'sec') using mocked prompts and temporary directories.
responsibilities: Set up isolated temporary directories for each test case to avoid side effects.
Write wrapper scripts to mock interactive prompts for the CLI under test.
Execute the built CLI binary via child_process.execFileSync with controlled arguments and environment.
Clean up temporary directories after each test via afterEach.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual functions or modules.
Production logic; this file is entirely test code.
Public API surface; it exports nothing.
invariants: Test file naming must conform to the rule: file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (cannot verify without filename).
Temporary directories must be created and cleaned up reliably.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide end-to-end test coverage for the CLI tool, ensuring security-related commands behave correctly in a controlled environment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit — this test suite was introduced as part of the first version of the project.
